ddls:
CREATE TABLE "posts" (
  "post_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each post */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the post */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the post */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the post */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Category identifier of the post */,
  "total_views" INTEGER /* Total number of views the post has received */,
  "date_added" TEXT /* Date the post was added */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Location identifier for the post */,
  "media_url" TEXT /* URL of any media (photos, videos) attached to the post */,
  "media_type" TEXT /* Type of media (e.g., image, video) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the post (e.g., active, reported, deleted) */,
  "last_modified" TEXT /* Last date and time the post was modified */,
  "number_of_comments" INTEGER /* Number of comments on the post */,
  "number_of_votes" INTEGER /* Number of votes (upvotes or downvotes) the post has received */,
  "is_featured" INTEGER /* Indicates if the post is featured */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("post_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_posts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_posts_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_posts_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., citizen, moderator, admin) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL of the user's profile picture */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date the user registered */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last date and time the user logged in */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user's account (e.g., active, suspended, deleted) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent category (if applicable) */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the category is active and can be used for posting */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the location */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the location */,
  "city" TEXT /* City name */,
  "state" TEXT /* State or province */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the location is active and can be used for posting */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "post_actions" (
  "action_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each action */,
  "post_id" INTEGER /* ID of the post where the action occurred */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the action */,
  "action_type" TEXT /* Type of action performed (e.g., edit, photo upload, download) */,
  "action_date" TEXT /* Date the action was performed */,
  "action_details" TEXT /* Additional details about the action */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the action (e.g., pending, approved, rejected) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("action_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_post_actions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_post_actions_post_id FOREIGN KEY ("post_id") REFERENCES posts ("post_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who received the notification */,
  "post_id" INTEGER /* ID of the post related to the notification */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., new post, comment, update) */,
  "sent_date" TEXT /* Date the notification was sent */,
  "is_read" INTEGER /* Indicates if the notification has been read by the user */,
  "message" TEXT /* Content of the notification message */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_post_id FOREIGN KEY ("post_id") REFERENCES posts ("post_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "post_id" INTEGER /* ID of the post that was reported */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the report */,
  "report_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was made */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., pending, resolved) */,
  "resolution_date" TEXT /* Date the report was resolved */,
  "resolution_details" TEXT /* Details about how the report was resolved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_post_id FOREIGN KEY ("post_id") REFERENCES posts ("post_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "post_id" INTEGER /* ID of the post the comment is on */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the comment */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the comment */,
  "date_added" TEXT /* Date the comment was added */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the comment (e.g., active, reported, deleted) */,
  "number_of_votes" INTEGER /* Number of votes (upvotes or downvotes) the comment has received */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_post_id FOREIGN KEY ("post_id") REFERENCES posts ("post_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "votes" (
  "vote_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vote */,
  "post_id" INTEGER /* ID of the post the vote is for */,
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the comment the vote is for (if applicable) */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who cast the vote */,
  "vote_type" TEXT /* Type of vote (e.g., upvote, downvote) */,
  "vote_date" TEXT /* Date the vote was cast */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vote_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_votes_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_votes_post_id FOREIGN KEY ("post_id") REFERENCES posts ("post_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_votes_comment_id FOREIGN KEY ("comment_id") REFERENCES comments ("comment_id")
)
